requirements.english: TOEFL iBT ≥90 (old scale) / IELTS 7.0; exempt with a US bachelor's degree (NYU qualifies)
requirements.admission_model_note: Direct admission to the program, then 9 units of CME 391 research rotations in year 1; permanent advisor must be aligned by summer of year 1, at which point the advisor assumes funding.

funding.note: Funded to department standard for the duration of the program via fellowship/RA/TA; auto-considered for Stanford Graduate Fellowship (3 yr).

requirements.contact_note: No official contact norm; the application's non-binding faculty-interest selection plus first-year rotations are the formal matching mechanism.

programs.data_currency: Data reflective of the posted Fall 2027 cycle pages, retrieved 2026-07-05. Fee/TOEFL are 2025-26 values — re-verify when the application opens Sept 2026. · faculty 2026-07-08

faculty.name: Eric Darve
faculty.title: Professor of Mechanical Engineering, Director of ICME
faculty.sub_field: Scientific Computing, Machine Learning, Numerical Linear Algebra
faculty.summary: Fast numerical algorithms for large-scale scientific computing, physics-informed machine learning, H-matrix methods. ICME Director.

faculty.title: Professor of Mechanical Engineering, Former ICME Director
faculty.summary: Uncertainty quantification, computational fluid dynamics, turbulence modeling, validation and verification. Former ICME Director.

faculty.name: Stephen Boyd
faculty.title: Professor of Electrical Engineering
faculty.summary: Convex optimization, embedded optimization, machine learning, control theory. Author of widely used textbooks.

faculty.name: Emmanuel Candes
faculty.title: Professor of Mathematics and Statistics
faculty.summary: Compressed sensing, high-dimensional statistics, matrix completion, multiple testing. 2026 Shaw Prize.

faculty.title: Professor of Statistics
faculty.summary: Wavelets, compressed sensing, high-dimensional data analysis, reproducible research.

faculty.name: Trevor Hastie

faculty.title: Professor of Computer Science
faculty.summary: Physically based animation, computational fluid dynamics, computer graphics. Oscar winner for film special effects technology.

faculty.name: Sanjiva Lele
faculty.title: Professor (Aeronautics & Astronautics, Mechanical Engineering)
faculty.summary: Aeroacoustics, compressible turbulence, high-fidelity numerical simulations.

faculty.title: Professor of Aeronautics and Astronautics
faculty.summary: Aircraft design, multidisciplinary optimization, uncertainty quantification, computational aerodynamics.

faculty.name: Ron Dror
faculty.title: Professor of Computer Science
faculty.summary: Computational structural biology, molecular dynamics simulation, protein structure prediction, machine learning.

requirements.english: English-language proficiency certificate (e.g. TOEFL/IELTS/CAE) unless prior degree taught in English — Verify
requirements.admission_model_note: Admission by the departmental committee on academic record; thesis supervisor chosen later from participating institutes (math, physics, CS, mechanical engineering).

funding.note: Tuition ≈CHF 730/semester; Excellence Scholarship (ESOP) covers full costs for top applicants — Verify.

requirements.contact_note: MSc admission is committee-based; contact matters mainly when seeking thesis supervision later.

programs.data_currency: MOCK entry for UI testing — values illustrative; verify against ethz.ch before use.

faculty.name: Siddhartha Mishra
faculty.title: Professor of Applied Mathematics, Seminar for Applied Mathematics
faculty.summary: Works on numerical analysis of PDEs and the mathematical foundations of scientific machine learning: robust schemes for hyperbolic conservation laws and computational fluid dynamics, and in recent years leading results on neural operators, error estimates for physics-informed learning, and ML-based ensemble forecasting for weather and climate. His group bridges rigorous numerical analysis and modern deep learning for the physical sciences — a strong thesis destination for CSE students heading toward a computational PhD.

faculty.name: Patrick Jenny
faculty.title: Professor, Institute of Fluid Dynamics
faculty.summary: Leads research on computational multiphase and turbulent flows: multiscale finite-volume methods for flow in porous media, PDF methods for turbulent combustion, blood flow and microcirculation modeling, and rarefied-gas dynamics. Recent projects include hybrid stochastic-deterministic solvers and model-order reduction for complex flow physics. A core advisor for CSE students specializing in the fluid-dynamics track.

faculty.name: Nicolas Gruber
faculty.title: Professor of Environmental Physics
faculty.summary: Environmental physicist studying the global carbon cycle and ocean biogeochemistry: the ocean sink for anthropogenic CO2 and its variability, ocean acidification and marine heatwave/compound extreme events, deoxygenation, and high-resolution regional biogeochemical modeling. His group combines global synthesis of observations with eddy-resolving simulation. Relevant for CSE students who want climate-flavored applications of large-scale computation.

requirements.admission_model: Faculty-match emphasized (applicants must name at least two faculty of interest)
